fix-all-monitors-color-temp.description: Fix: apply current colour temperature when enabling all-monitors mode (PR created via safeoutputs run 27889906149, Closes #57)

fix-hotkey-feedback.description: Fix: notify user when global hotkey registration fails (PR created via safeoutputs run 27889906149, Closes #59)

improve-atomic-settings-save.description: Atomic write (temp+rename) in AppSettings.Save() - PR submitted via safeoutputs run 27829860158

improve-display-affinity-helper.description: Extract ApplyDisplayAffinity helper - eliminates 4x repeated HWND/affinity block

improve-tray-state-feedback.description: Tray tooltip and menu item reflect current light on/off state

eng-global-json.description: Add global.json to pin .NET SDK to 10.0.x - issue #62
